rationale: No headlines this cycle introduce a qualitative change relevant to Romania's security, energy, or domestic politics; all ongoing situations continue without new developments.

top_events.title: Protesters clash with police ahead of G7 summit in Geneva
top_events.summary: G7 protests in Geneva are a European event but have no direct bearing on Romania's security or economy at this stage.

top_events.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Continued rhetoric around Iran deal and Beirut — no confirmed policy shift affecting Romanian energy costs or Black Sea security.

top_events.title: Israel expands military control in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria by 1,000sq km
top_events.summary: Israeli territorial expansion in the Middle East is a distant event; indirect energy price risk exists but no confirmed market move affecting Romania.
